name: Javelin Mortgage Investment Corp.
description: Javelin Mortgage Investment Corp. was a mortgage real estate investment trust (mREIT) that primarily invested in residential mortgage-backed securities. The company focused on generating income from the spread between the interest earned on its mortgage assets and the cost of borrowing to finance those assets. Following periods of pressure from activist investors and strategic reviews, the company was acquired by ARMOUR Residential REIT, Inc. in 2016, leading to its dissolution as an independent publicly traded entity.
